blocks.text: Nine points to close — Real Madrid's title window narrows tonight

Barcelona sit 9 points clear at the summit with the season tightening. Los Blancos cannot afford a slip against bottom-side Alavés — dropped points tonight make the championship chase near-impossible.
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Chelsea at Brighton, European places still in play
🎾 Madrid Open underway — Ruud begins clay campaign at Masters 1000 Madrid

blocks.label: Must-watch ahead
items: ⚽ Wed 21:30 — Barcelona vs Celta Vigo (La Liga title race)
🎮 Thu 17:00 — rain & 100 Thieves vs BIG, CCT Global Finals
⚽ Fri 21:00 — Real Madrid at Betis (title decider?)
⚽ Sat 16:00 — Crystal Palace vs Liverpool at Anfield
